item.name: Fields
Factset Available Private Company Fields, Metrics, and Ratios.

request.name: Factset Available Private Company Fields, Metrics, and Ratios.

description.content: Returns list of available Private Company fields that can be used in the `fields` parameter of related endpoints. These are related to FactSet Private Company standardized data.

query.description:
Filters the list of available fields per endpoint  -
  * **FINANCIALS** = Financials endpoint data items, such as Assets, Liabilities, and EBITDA.
  * **NON_PERIODIC** = Non-Periodic endpoint data items, such as ISO Currency, Current CEO, and Investor List.

response.name: Private Company data items

item.name: Financials

description.content: Retrieve Private Company Financials

item.name: Factset Returns Private Company Financials for a List of Ids.

request.name: Factset Returns Private Company Financials for a List of Ids.

description.content: Returns Private Company Financials Information.

query.description:
(Required) The requested FactSet Private Market Entity Identifier in XXXXXX-E format.

**Max Ids Limit set to 3000 in a single request**

*

Make note, GET Method URL request lines are also limited to a total length of 8192 bytes (8KB). In cases where the service allows for thousands of ids, which may lead to exceeding this request line limit of 8KB, its advised for any requests with large request lines to be requested through the respective \"POST\" method.

*
(Required) Private Markets Financials Fields.
(Required) The start date requested for a given date range in **YYYY-MM-DD** format. If left blank, the API will default to previous close. Future dates (T+1) are not accepted in this endpoint.
The end date requested for a given date range in **YYYY-MM-DD** format. If left blank, the API will default to previous close. Future dates (T+1) are not accepted in this endpoint.

response.name: Fetches Private Company Financials for a list of ids.

item.name: Factset Returns Private Company Reference Data for a List of Ids.

request.name: Factset Returns Private Company Reference Data for a List of Ids.

description.content: Returns Private Company reference information.

query.description:
(Required) The requested FactSet Private Market Entity Identifier in XXXXXX-E format.

**Max Ids Limit set to 3000 in a single request**

*

Make note, GET Method URL request lines are also limited to a total length of 8192 bytes (8KB). In cases where the service allows for thousands of ids, which may lead to exceeding this request line limit of 8KB, its advised for any requests with large request lines to be requested through the respective \"POST\" method.

*
(Required) Private Markets Non-Periodic Fields.

response.name: Fetches Private Company reference data for a list of ids.

item.name: Factset Available Private Company Fields, Metrics, and Ratios.

request.name: Factset Available Private Company Fields, Metrics, and Ratios.

description.content: Returns list of available Private Company fields that can be used in the `fields` parameter of related endpoints. These are related to FactSet Private Company standardized data.

query.description:
Filters the list of available fields per endpoint  -
  * **FINANCIALS** = Financials endpoint data items, such as Assets, Liabilities, and EBITDA.
  * **NON_PERIODIC** = Non-Periodic endpoint data items, such as ISO Currency, Current CEO, and Investor List.

response.name: Private Company data items

item.name: Factset Get Entity Candidates and Matches for a Single Name and Attributes.

request.name: Factset Get Entity Candidates and Matches for a Single Name and Attributes.

description.content:
Finds the best candidate entities matching the given entity name. Country code can also be supplied to narrow the search.

**Max of 1 Name permitted in a single GET request.** Use the POST method for /entity-match to fetch up to 25 names.

query.description: (Required) Name of Entity to match.
ISO2 country code corresponding to the entity name that is used when evaluating candidates for a match. For a list of ISO2 Country codes, visit [OA 8754](https://my.apps.factset.com/oa/pages/8754).

response.name: Response containing Entity Match results.
